issue_title: (Bug) Checkboxes cannot be sized down beyond a certain limit
issue_body_preview:
### Description

When inserting or editing a checkbox field in the [form creator](https://bentopdf.com/form-creator.html), you cannot resize the checkbox smaller than a certain amount.

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to the [form creator](https://bentopdf.com/form-creator.html)
2. Upload a PDF.
3. In
test_description_zh: 在表单创建器页面上传 PDF 后，插入一个复选框字段，尝试将复选框尺寸缩小到极小值，观察缩放行为是否流畅且不受异常限制。
expected_result_zh: 复选框能够被缩小到用户期望的任意小尺寸，不会在缩放过程中卡在某个最小限制值而无法继续缩小。
